nodes.name: sciona.mint.encoding_dist_mat
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Replaces singleton atom subpackages with a flat module layout.

nodes.name: encodedistancematrix
nodes.description: Encodes TCR CDR3/epitope distance matrices into a fixed-size centered representation and matching validity mask.

inputs.name: max_cdr3
inputs.constraints: positive maximum CDR3 axis length; default 20

inputs.name: max_epi
inputs.constraints: positive maximum epitope axis length; default 12

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: encoded float32 values and boolean validity mask

nodes.type_signature: (mat_list: Sequence[np.ndarray], max_cdr3: int = 20, max_epi: int = 12) -> tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Places each source matrix in the upstream MINT CDR3-centered/epitope-offset location and returns both values and mask.
nodes.critic_notes: pubrev-019 remediated prior top-left padding and missing-mask drift against upstream tcr-interface teim_utils.encoding_dist_mat.
